title: Lava Pickaxe 🔥
description: Lava Pickaxe adds a powerful pickaxe that smelts blocks instantly when mined, saving fuel and time while mining.
body:
When mining blocks, the Lava Pickaxe automatically smelts ores, saving time, fuel, and inventory space. No more hauling raw ore back to base — mine and get the finished product instantly.

✨ Features

⛏️ Automatically smelts ores when mined

🔥 Turns ores like iron and gold directly into ingots

⚒️ Right-click with an unsmelted item in your offhand to smelt it

🧹 Reduces inventory clutter

🧱 Works with vanilla and modded blocks

⚠️ Notes

Requires Forge 1.20.1 (47.4.10)

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer

Designed to feel balanced and vanilla-friendly
